title: 2025-10-15 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 13.00
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-10-15: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 13.00/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
